embeds.title: Co Owner
embeds.description: You hold **top-level administrative authority**, second only to the Owner. You act as primary decision-maker when the Owner is unavailable and oversee the entire staff chain below you.

fields.name: 📋 Core Responsibilities
fields.value:
• Assist the Owner with daily server operations
• Act as primary authority when the Owner is offline
• Oversee Head Executives, Executives, and Administrators
• Handle ban appeals escalated from Head Administrators
• Review and approve significant moderation actions
• Participate in all major policy decisions

fields.name: 🔑 Admin Panel Access
fields.value:
You have full access to the TSHE website admin panel to manage site content, toggle maintenance mode, edit rules, punishments, staff guides, services, and more.

**URL:** https://tshe.noxxbot.com/admin
**Credentials:** Provided by the Owner — keep them strictly private.

Sessions expire after **8 hours**.

fields.name: ⚡ Authority Overview
fields.value:
• Near-full server permissions
• Can manage all staff below Co-Owner
• Can issue and reverse all punishment types including permanent bans
• Can approve staff promotions up to Administrator level
• Access to all staff channels and logs

fields.name: 🚨 When to Act Directly
fields.value:
• Head Administrator cannot resolve a situation
• A ban appeal requires high-level review
• Inter-staff conflict needing senior intervention
• Owner is offline and an urgent decision is required
• Any Executive-level staff misconduct report

fields.name: 📞 Escalation Chain
fields.value:
**Receives from:** Head Executive, Executives, Head Admins
**Escalates to:** Owner (critical situations only)

Handle as much as possible at your level — only escalate to the Owner for decisions that broadly affect the server or involve leadership misconduct.

fields.name: 🌐 Key Links
fields.value:
🔗 [Admin Panel](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/admin) — Site management
📜 [Rules Page](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/rules) — Community rules
🛡️ [Staff Guide](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/staff) — Public role guide
⚖️ [Appeal System](https://appeal.gg/s/1466990155020898413) — Ban appeals
